---
title: "Dashboard Demo-1"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
embed-resources: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# packages
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)


# Analysis on data "storms" from dplyr

# Number of storms by year
storms_count_per_year = storms |> 
  count(year, name) |> 
  count(year)
```


# Storm Count

```{r}
# Bar chart of tropical cyclones count per year
ggplotly(
  storms_count_per_year |> 
    ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#009999") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Tropical Cyclones in the North Atlantic",
         y = "count")
)
```
